name: Spark
description: Connect Claude to your inbox — read, draft, triage, and act on email, calendars, meetings, and contacts.
long_description:
Connect Claude to Spark on macOS or Windows to give your agent access to your emails. Ask about your inbox, then let Claude do the work — read threads, organize your inbox, and draft replies without leaving the conversation.

Tools are discovered dynamically when Spark Desktop is running, so Claude always sees what’s actually available.

Key Features:
• **Connect any account** — Give Claude access to any Spark email account, including Gmail, Outlook, Exchange, iCloud, Yahoo, and IMAP.
• **Read and search your workspace** — Browse and search emails, list folders, read full threads with bodies and attachments, look up contacts, and review meeting transcripts.
• **Check schedules and availability** — Look up calendar events and find mutual availability with teammates.
• **Compose and share drafts** — Create new emails, replies, and forwards (with attachments or from saved templates), and share them with teammates for review.
• **Triage conversations** — Archive, pin, snooze, move, label, mark as done, share with the team, and assign or delegate messages.
• **Organize and manage** — Reclassify smart categories and manage contacts (block/accept, set category, mark important/primary, toggle auto-summary).
• **Collaborate in context** — Post team chat comments on shared threads.

**Access and Permissions**: Each account and shared inbox has its own access level — read-only or triage — configurable in Spark Desktop > Settings > AI Agents. Write access (drafting, triage, and contact management) is only available where you’ve enabled it.

tools.name: accounts
tools.description: List all configured email accounts with their calendars, teams, and shared inboxes

tools.name: emails
tools.description: List emails with metadata, pagination, and Gmail-style filters

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search emails by topic using keyword and semantic matching

tools.name: thread
tools.description: Read a full email thread with headers, bodies, and attachments

tools.name: attachment
tools.description: Read a single email attachment by its ID and return image/audio/text/binary MCP content - auto-downloads the file if it isn't cached locally yet

tools.name: events
tools.description: List calendar events for a time range

tools.name: availability
tools.description: Find free time slots for scheduling

tools.name: contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name or email

tools.name: team
tools.description: Show team info, members, and assignments

tools.name: meeting
tools.description: Read a meeting transcript summary, transcript, and notes

tools.name: templates
tools.description: List saved Spark message templates (personal and team)

tools.name: template
tools.description: Show a single message template by ID or name with its placeholders

tools.name: draft
tools.description: Create or edit an email draft - new, reply, forward, update, or from a saved template; supports attachments, markdown body, and sharing with teammates

tools.name: comment
tools.description: Post a team chat comment on a thread; auto-shares the thread if needed

tools.name: action
tools.description: Perform email actions - archive, pin, snooze, move, label, assign, share, mark as done, reclassify category, and more

tools.name: contact-action
tools.description: Manage contacts - block/accept, change category, mark important/primary, toggle auto-summary
